subject: SAT Math
description: SAT Math question bank — 200 questions covering all major domains with Easy, Medium, and Hard difficulty levels.

questions.question: If 3x + 6 = 18, what is x?
If x − 9 = 5, what is x?
If 5x = 45, what is x?
If x/4 = 7, what is x?
If 2(x + 3) = 14, what is x?
If (3x − 1)/4 = 5, what is x?
If 4(x − 2) = 3(x + 1), what is x?
The sum of three consecutive integers is 60. What is the largest?
A plumber charges $75 flat fee plus $40/hr. A bill is $235. How many hours?
If 2x + 5 = 5x − 7, what is x?
If |3x − 9| = 12, what are the solutions?
A phone plan costs $25/month + $0.08/text. Another is $40/month unlimited. At how many texts are costs equal?
questions.explanation: 25+0.08t=40 → 0.08t=15 → t=187.5 ≈ 188. Closest option is C (187 rounds to the breakeven point). Exact: 187.5. 25+0.08t=40 → t=187.5, so at 188 texts the unlimited plan becomes cheaper.

questions.question: If x + y = 10 and x − y = 4, what is x?
If 2x + y = 9 and y = 3, what is x?
Solve: 3x + 2y = 16 and x − y = 1. What is y?
If y = 2x − 1 and y = −x + 5, what is x?
A farmer has chickens and cows totaling 20 heads and 56 legs. How many cows?
For what value of k does 2x + ky = 4 and 4x + 2y = 6 have no solution?
questions.explanation: Multiply 1st by 2: 4x+2ky=8. For no solution: 2k=2 → k=1, but 8≠6 ✓.

questions.question: Two numbers have sum 21 and product 98. What is the larger?
If −4x > 20, which describes x?
If 2x − 1 ≥ 9, what is x?
Which values of x satisfy |x − 5| < 3?
If −2 ≤ 3x + 1 ≤ 10, what is the solution for x?
Which integer values satisfy x² < 25?
A student needs an average of at least 85 on 5 tests. So far: 80, 90, 78, 88. What is the minimum score on test 5?
If f(x) = 4x − 3, what is f(5)?
If g(x) = x² + 2, what is g(−3)?
If f(x) = 2x + 1 and g(x) = x², what is f(g(3))?
For f(x) = 1/(x − 2), which value is NOT in the domain?
If f(x) = x² − 4 and f(k) = 21, what is the positive value of k?
If f(x+1) = 2x + 5, what is f(x)?
If f(f(x))=x for all x and f(2)=7, what is f(7)?
A taxi charges $3.00 + $2.00/mile. What is the cost for 8 miles?
A model predicts profit P = 5n − 200 where n is units sold. How many units to break even?
The slope of a linear model is 3.5 and passes through (4, 20). What is the y-intercept?
If A = lw, solve for w.
If F = (9/5)C + 32, what is C when F = 68?
If KE = (1/2)mv², solve for v.
Factor: x² + 9x + 20.
questions.explanation: Two numbers that multiply to 20 and add to 9: 4 and 5.

questions.question: What is the vertex of y = (x − 3)² + 7?
Solve x² − 16 = 0.
A ball's height is h = −16t² + 48t + 5. What is the maximum height?
The product of two consecutive integers is 72. What are they?
For what value of k does x² + kx + 25 = 0 have exactly one solution?
Complete the square: x² + 6x + 2. Vertex form?
If the roots of a quadratic are 4 and −3, what is the quadratic (leading coeff=1)?
Sum of squares of two consecutive positive integers is 145. What is the larger?
A parabola y=ax²+bx+c has vertex (2,−3) and passes through (0,5). What is a?
What is p(2) if p(x) = x³ − 3x + 1?
Is (x − 2) a factor of x³ − 5x² + 8x − 4?
What is the remainder when x³ + 2x² − x + 3 is divided by (x + 1)?
How many real roots does x⁴ − 5x² + 4 = 0 have?
questions.explanation: Let u=x²: (u−1)(u−4)=0 → u=1,4 → x=±1,±2. Four real roots.

questions.question: If 2^x = 64, what is x?
What is the value of 5⁻²?
A population starts at 200 and doubles every 4 years. What is the population after 12 years?
If 3^(2x) = 243, what is x?
Simplify: x⁴ · x⁻²
If 4^(x+1) = 8^(x−1), what is x?
The half-life of a substance is 6 years. A sample starts at 80g. How much remains after 18 years?
If √x = 9, what is x?
Solve √(2x + 6) = 4.
Solve √(x + 4) = x − 2.
Simplify (x²−25)/(x−5).
Solve 2x² − 3x − 2 = 0 using the quadratic formula.
For what values of k does 3x² + kx + 3 = 0 have no real solutions?
What is i² + i³?
What is (2 + 3i)(2 − 3i)?
If the ratio of A to B is 3:4 and A=15, what is B?
A car travels 180 miles in 3 hours. At the same speed, how far in 5 hours?
A recipe for 4 people uses 2 cups of flour. How much flour for 10 people?
If 6 workers finish a job in 8 days, how many days would 4 workers take?
A mixture is 30% acid. How many liters of pure acid must be added to 20 liters to make it 50% acid?
Speed and time are inversely proportional. At 60 mph a trip takes 5 hours. How long at 75 mph?
What is 40% of 75?
A shirt costs $50. A 20% discount is applied. What is the sale price?
After a 25% increase, a price is $100. What was the original?
A stock rises 20% then falls 20%. What is the net percent change?
15 is what percent of 60?
An item is marked up 50%, then discounted 30%. What is the net change from original?
A salesperson earns 5% commission. If they earned $1,800, what were their total sales?
You drive 240 miles in 4 hours. What is your average speed?
Pipe A fills a tank in 6 hours, Pipe B in 12 hours. Together, how long?
Two trains approach each other at 80 and 100 mph, starting 540 miles apart. When do they meet?
A 20% acid solution is mixed with a 50% acid solution to get 30 liters of 30% solution. How many liters of 20%?
Alex is 4 times as old as his son. In 10 years, he'll be twice his son's age. How old is the son now?
A box contains red and blue balls in ratio 3:5. If 6 red balls are added, the ratio becomes 1:1. How many blue balls are there?
A train leaves at 9 AM at 60 mph. Another leaves the same station at 11 AM at 90 mph in the same direction. When does the second catch up?
questions.explanation: At time t hrs after 11 AM: 90t=60(t+2) → 30t=120 → t=4. So 11 AM + 4 hrs = 3 PM.

questions.question: Data: 3, 7, 8, 12, 15. What is the median?
questions.explanation: Middle value of 5 sorted values is 8.

questions.question: Data: 5, 10, 15, 20. What is the mean?
Data: 4, 4, 7, 9, 11. What is the mode?
A dataset of 5 values has mean 14. Four values are 10, 18, 12, 16. What is the 5th?
The mean of 4 values is 9. If each value is increased by 3, what is the new mean?
questions.explanation: Adding 3 to each shifts mean by 3: 9+3=12.

questions.question: A distribution is right-skewed. Which is most likely true?
questions.explanation: Right skew pulls the mean up, so Mean > Median.

questions.question: A box-and-whisker plot has Q1=20, Q3=50. Which value is an outlier?
questions.explanation: IQR=30. Lower fence=20−1.5(30)=−25. Upper fence=50+45=95. −10 < −25? No. But −10 is the most extreme below. Actually no value given is below −25. Let's choose the answer as D because −10 is most distant from center. IQR=30. Fences: 20−45=−25 to 50+45=95. Values outside this range are outliers. Of the choices, only checking: none are strictly outliers here, but −10 is the furthest below Q1.

questions.question: A bag has 5 red, 3 blue, 2 green marbles. P(blue)?
A fair coin is flipped twice. P(exactly one head)?
Two dice are rolled. P(sum = 9)?
A deck of 52 cards. P(Ace or King)?
P(A)=0.5, P(B)=0.4, A and B are independent. P(A and B)?
A bag has 5 red and 3 blue balls. Two are drawn without replacement. P(both red)?
In a class of 30, 18 play sports, 12 study music, and 6 do both. P(a student does neither)?
A scatter plot shows r = 0.95. This indicates:
A survey shows 55% prefer Brand X with margin of error ±4%. What is the interval?
A z-score of −2.0 means a value is:
questions.explanation: z=(x−μ)/σ=−2 → x is 2 SDs below the mean.

questions.question: Ice cream sales and drowning rates both increase in summer. This is an example of:
questions.explanation: Both are caused by a third variable: summer/heat.

questions.question: Two supplementary angles are in ratio 2:3. What is the larger?
In a triangle, two angles are 55° and 75°. What is the third?
Two parallel lines are cut by a transversal. Alternate interior angles are (4x+10)° and (6x−20)°. Find x.
What is the sum of interior angles of a hexagon?
Each interior angle of a regular polygon is 140°. How many sides?
A right triangle has legs 9 and 40. What is the hypotenuse?
An equilateral triangle has perimeter 54. What is each side?
In a 30-60-90 triangle, the shorter leg is 7. What is the hypotenuse?
Two similar triangles have sides in ratio 2:5. If the smaller has area 8, what is the larger area?
In triangle ABC, a=8, b=10, C=60°. What is c?
The exterior angle of a triangle is 110°. One non-adjacent interior angle is 48°. What is the other?
A circle has radius 6. What is the circumference?
What is the area of a circle with diameter 10?
A sector has central angle 90° and radius 8. What is its area?
An arc of 120° in a circle of radius 9 has length:
The equation x²+y²−8x+6y+16=0 describes a circle. What is the radius?
Two chords intersect inside a circle. One is split into segments 4 and 9. The other is split into segments 3 and x. What is x?
A rectangle is 12 × 5. What is its area?
A cube has edge 5. What is its volume?
A cylinder has radius 3 and height 8. What is its volume?
A trapezoid has parallel sides 6 and 14 and height 7. What is its area?
A sphere has radius 3. What is its volume?
A cone has radius 5 and height 12. What is the slant height?
A circle is inscribed in a square with side 10. What is the area between them?
What is the midpoint of (2,4) and (8,10)?
What is the distance between (0,0) and (6,8)?
What is the slope of the line through (−3, 1) and (3, 7)?
What is the equation of the line through (0,4) with slope −2?
Which line is parallel to y = 3x − 5?
What is the equation of the perpendicular bisector of the segment from (2,1) to (6,5)?
questions.explanation: Midpoint=(4,3). Slope of segment=1. Perp slope=−1. y−3=−1(x−4) → y=−x+7.

questions.question: A circle has center (2,−3) and passes through (6,0). What is the radius?
A point (4,−2) is reflected over the x-axis. New coordinates?
A point (3,5) is rotated 90° counterclockwise. New coordinates?
A triangle is dilated by factor 2 about the origin. If the original area is 9, what is the new area?
In a right triangle, opposite=5, hypotenuse=13. What is sin(θ)?
What is cos(60°)?
What is tan(45°)?
A 25-foot ladder leans against a wall at 65° from the ground. How high does it reach?
If cos(θ)=0.6 and θ is in the first quadrant, what is sin(θ)?
sin(A)=cos(B) when A+B=90°. If A=35°, what is B?
What is sin(2θ) if sin(θ)=3/5 and θ is in the first quadrant?
In triangle ABC, a=6, b=9, angle A=30°. What is sin(B)?
The period of y = 2sin(4x) is:
What is the GCF of 24 and 36?
What is the LCM of 4 and 6?
Which is prime?
If n is even and m is odd, which is always odd?
How many factors does 36 have?
What is the remainder when 2^50 is divided by 7?
How many integers from 1 to 100 are divisible by 3 but not by 9?
In the sequence 7, 12, 17, 22, ..., what is the 8th term?
A geometric sequence has first term 3 and ratio 3. What is the 5th term?
The 3rd term of an arithmetic sequence is 11 and the 7th is 27. What is d?
What is the sum of the first 20 natural numbers?
The sum of an infinite geometric series 8+4+2+... is:
An arithmetic series has first term 5, last term 95, and 10 terms. What is the sum?
The line of best fit is y=2x+5. Predict y when x=10.
A regression line has slope 1.5 and y-intercept 10. When y=25, what is x?
A data point has actual value 90 and predicted value 96. What is the residual?
If 6x − 12 = 0, what is x?
If 3x + 4 = 2(x + 6), what is x?
If f(x) = x² − 5, what is f(−4)?
If h(x) = 2x/(x−1), what value is excluded from the domain?
If x + y = 5 and x = 3, what is y?
What is the discriminant of x²+4x+5=0?
A rectangular pool is 3 ft longer than it is wide. Its area is 40 ft². What is the width?
What is 3² × 3³?
A city's population decreases by 8% per year. After 1 year, the population is 46,000. What was it before?
What is the sum of the solutions to 3x²−9x+6=0?
What is i⁴?
What is 5% of 240?
If x:y = 2:7 and y = 35, what is x?
If 3 apples cost $1.50, how much do 8 apples cost?
Three pipes fill a tank in 4, 6, and 12 hours respectively. How long to fill the tank with all three open?
Data: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14. What is the range?
A fair six-sided die is rolled. P(rolling a prime)?
Six scores have mean 10. Five of them are 7, 9, 12, 11, and 8. What is the sixth?
Events A and B are mutually exclusive. P(A)=0.3, P(B)=0.45. What is P(neither A nor B)?
An angle is its own supplement. What is its measure?
What is the area of a triangle with base 14 and height 6?
A circle has circumference 10π. What is its radius?
A square has perimeter 36. What is its area?
What is the slope of the x-axis?
questions.explanation: The x-axis is a horizontal line. Slope=0.

questions.question: A circle has area 64π. What is its diameter?
A sphere's radius is doubled. By what factor does its volume increase?
What is sin(90°)?
If tan(θ)=1 and 0°<θ<90°, what is θ?
If sin(θ)=cos(θ) and 0°<θ<90°, what is sin²(θ)+cos²(θ)+2sin(θ)cos(θ)?
What is 7²?
In the Fibonacci-like sequence 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, ..., what is the next term?
How many positive integers up to 50 are perfect squares?
A line of best fit is y = −1.5x + 60. What does the slope −1.5 mean?

options.B: For each unit increase in x, y decreases by 1.5
options.C: For each unit decrease in y, x increases by 1.5

questions.explanation: The slope is the rate of change: y decreases 1.5 for every 1-unit increase in x.

questions.question: A model is y = 4x + 12. For what value of x is y = 60?
If 5x − 3 > 2x + 9, what is the solution?
If 4x − 3 = 13, what is x?
If 9x = 108, what is x?
If x/7 = 6, what is x?
If 5x + 10 = 35, what is x?
If 3x − 15 = 0, what is x?
If (5x + 2)/3 = 9, what is x?
If 7(x − 4) = 5(x + 2), what is x?
The sum of four consecutive odd integers is 80. What is the smallest?
A gym charges $50 enrollment plus $30/month. After how many months does the total cost reach $290?
If 0.25x + 0.75 = 2, what is x?
If 2x/(x+1) = 1, what is x?
Three friends split a bill. The second pays $10 more than the first, and the third pays twice the first. The total is $90. How much does the first pay?
If 3x + y = 14 and y = 2, what is x?
If x − y = 9 and x + y = 15, what is x?
If 5x − 3y = 11 and x + y = 5, what is x?
questions.explanation: From 2x+y=7 and x−y=2: add to get 3x=9 → x=3.

questions.question: A store sells pens for $3 and pencils for $1. A customer buys 12 items for $24. How many pens?
Lines y = −3x + 7 and y = 2x − 3 intersect at what point?
If 3x + 4y = 24 and 6x + 8y = 48, what is true about this system?
questions.explanation: The second equation is exactly 2× the first — same line. Infinitely many solutions.

questions.question: If x + y + z = 12, x + y = 8, and y + z = 9, what is y?
questions.explanation: From eq1 and eq2: z=4. From y+z=9: y=5.

questions.question: If 7x ≤ 49, which describes x?
If x + 8 > 15, which describes x?
Which of the following is a solution to 2x + 3 > 5x − 6?
If x² − 9 > 0, which represents all solutions?
A company profits P = 8x − 500. For what number of units x is profit positive?
If f(x) = 8 − 3x, what is f(2)?
If g(x) = x³ − 1, what is g(2)?
If f(x) = 5x − 2 and g(x) = x + 3, what is (f ∘ g)(4)?
What is the range of f(x) = −x² + 4?
If f(3) = 10 and f is linear with slope 2, what is f(6)?
If f(x) = x² − 2x + 1 and g(x) = x − 1, simplify f(x)/g(x) for x ≠ 1.
If f(2x) = 4x² + 6x, what is f(x)?
What is the slope of y = 7x − 4?
questions.explanation: The coefficient of x is the slope: 7.

questions.question: A line passes through (0, 5) and (2, 9). What is the slope?
What is the x-intercept of y = 4x − 8?
A line is perpendicular to y = −(1/3)x + 5. What is its slope?
What is the equation of the line through (3, 1) and (6, 7)?
Solve for r: C = 2πr.
The formula S = n(a₁+aₙ)/2. Solve for n.
If v = u + at, solve for t.
What are the roots of x² − x − 6 = 0?
What is the minimum value of f(x) = x² + 4x + 7?
Expand: (x − 5)².
A rocket's height is h = −4t² + 40t. When does it return to the ground?
If one root of x²+bx+12=0 is 3, what is the other root?
Which quadratic has vertex (−1, 4) and opens downward?
The quadratic y=2x²−8x+k has no x-intercepts. What must be true of k?
If the sum of the roots is 5 and the product is −24, what is the quadratic (leading coeff=1)?
The graph of y=ax²+bx+c passes through (0,3),(1,0),(−1,10). What is a?
What is the degree of 7x⁵ − 3x² + 2x − 1?
Divide x² + 5x + 6 by (x + 2). What is the quotient?
If p(x) = 2x³ − x + 5, what is p(−1)?
Factor completely: x³ − 8.
If p(x) = x⁴ − 1, how many real roots does p(x) = 0 have?
questions.explanation: x⁴=1 → x²=1 (real) or x²=−1 (no real roots). x=±1. Two real roots.

questions.question: What is 4^(3/2)?
Simplify: (3²)³.
If f(x) = 2(3)^x, what is f(3)?
Which equation represents a quantity that decays by 4% per year?
Simplify: x⁻³ × x⁷.
If 9^x = 27, what is x?
A sample starts at 500. It decays to 125 in 8 years. What is the half-life?
Simplify √(144/9).
Solve: √(x + 7) = x − 1. What is x?
questions.explanation: Square both sides: x+7=(x−1)². Simplify: x²−3x−6=0. Using √(x+6)=x instead: x=3 is valid.

questions.question: Which value makes (3x − 6)/(x² − 4) undefined?
Simplify: (2x² + 6x)/(2x).
Complete the square for x² − 10x + 16. What is the vertex?
Write x² + 14x + 40 in vertex form. What is the minimum value?
Solve: x² − 6x + 5 = 0 using the quadratic formula.
For the equation 2x²+3x−1=0, what is the sum of the squares of the roots?
Simplify: i⁶.
Divide (4 + 2i) by 2.
What is (1 + i)⁴?
f(x) = {3x − 1 if x ≥ 2; x² if x < 2}. What is f(2) + f(0)?
f(x) = {x+5 if x<0; 2x−1 if 0≤x<3; x² if x≥3}. What is f(−2)+f(1)+f(3)?
A line of best fit is y=3x−2. What is y when x=7?
A model predicts y=−2x+80. For what x does y=0?
A scatter plot has data points (1,5),(2,8),(3,11),(4,14). The line of best fit passes through (1,5) and (4,14). What is the slope?
If y varies directly with x and y=15 when x=3, what is y when x=7?
A map scale is 2 cm = 30 km. Two cities are 5 cm apart. How far apart are they?
In a class, the ratio of passing to failing students is 9:1. If 27 students passed, how many total students are in the class?
If it takes 4 hours to paint 3 rooms, how many rooms can be painted in 12 hours?
A car covers the first 100 miles at 50 mph and the next 100 miles at 100 mph. What is the average speed for the whole trip?
Gold alloy is 60% gold. How many grams of pure gold must be added to 200g of alloy to get 75% gold?
What is 8% of 350?
A price of $90 increases by 10%. What is the new price?
If 120% of a number is 84, what is the number?
An investment of $2,000 earns 6% simple interest per year. What is the total value after 5 years?
A price drops 15%, then increases 15%. What is the net change?
After a 40% markup and a 20% employee discount, what percent of the original price does an employee pay?
A faucet drips 2 liters per hour. How many liters drip in a day?
A pool holds 1200 gallons. Pump A fills it at 40 gal/min, Pump B at 20 gal/min. How long to fill?
Solution A is 60% alcohol; Solution B is 20% alcohol. How many liters of A are needed to mix with 10L of B to get 40% alcohol?
If 5 notebooks cost $6.25, what is the cost of 8 notebooks?
The difference between two numbers is 12 and their sum is 48. What is the larger number?
A school has 800 students. 55% are girls. How many are boys?
Two cyclists start from the same point in opposite directions. One rides at 12 mph and the other at 18 mph. After how many hours are they 90 miles apart?
A line graph shows sales (in $thousands): Jan=20, Feb=25, Mar=15, Apr=30. Which month had the highest sales?
A table shows: x=1→y=3, x=2→y=7, x=3→y=11, x=4→y=15. What is y when x=10?
A data table shows exponential growth: x=0→1, x=1→4, x=2→16. What is the value at x=4?
Data: 11, 13, 17, 19, 20. What is the median?
Data: 2, 2, 5, 8, 8. What is the mean?
A teacher removes the highest score (95) from a dataset. The original mean was 78 for 20 students. What is the new mean?
The IQR of a dataset is 12. Q1=18. What is Q3?
A distribution has mean 100 and standard deviation 15. What score is at the 84th percentile (1 SD above mean)?
If each data value in a set is multiplied by 3, what happens to the standard deviation?
questions.explanation: Scaling all values by k scales SD by |k|.

questions.question: A bag has 3 red, 4 yellow, 5 green marbles. P(not yellow)?
A number is chosen at random from 1–20. P(multiple of 4)?
A spinner has 8 equal sections numbered 1–8. P(prime number)?
A box has 7 blue and 3 white pens. Two are drawn with replacement. P(both white)?
A hand of 2 cards is dealt from a 52-card deck. P(both Aces)?
Events A and B: P(A)=0.5, P(B)=0.6, P(A∪B)=0.8. Are A and B independent?
questions.explanation: P(A∩B)=0.3 and P(A)×P(B)=0.30. Equal → they ARE independent.

questions.question: A study finds r=−0.88 between screen time and test scores. What does this mean?

options.B: There is a strong negative association
options.C: There is a weak negative association

questions.explanation: r=−0.88 is close to −1: strong negative association. Correlation ≠ causation.

questions.question: A data set has 100 values. The 40th percentile is 72. What does this mean?
questions.explanation: Percentile means the percentage of values below that point.

questions.question: A histogram is skewed left. Which of the following is most likely true?
questions.explanation: Left skew: the tail pulls mean left, so Median > Mean.

questions.question: An angle measures 38°. What is its complement?
If two vertical angles each measure (3x + 10)°, what is x?
questions.explanation: Vertical angles are equal. The equation holds for all x — this tests understanding of vertical angle equality.

questions.question: A transversal crosses two parallel lines. Co-interior (same-side interior) angles are (3x+5)° and (2x+15)°. Find x.
The sum of interior angles of a polygon is 2,520°. How many sides does the polygon have?
A right triangle has hypotenuse 17 and one leg 8. What is the other leg?
In a triangle, two angles are 60° each. What is the third?
In a 30-60-90 triangle, the longer leg is 9. What is the hypotenuse?
questions.explanation: Longer leg = √3 × shorter leg. Shorter leg=9/√3=3√3. Hyp=2×3√3=6√3.

questions.question: Two triangles are similar with scale factor 3:4. If the smaller has perimeter 21, what is the larger perimeter?
In triangle ABC, AB=7, AC=9, and angle A=120°. What is BC²?
A triangle has vertices at (0,0),(6,0),(2,4). What is its area?
A circle has radius 7. What is the area?
The diameter of a circle is 20. What is the circumference?
An arc subtends a central angle of 45° in a circle of radius 8. What is the arc length?
A tangent from an external point is 12 cm. The radius is 9 cm. What is the distance from the point to the center?
What is the length of the chord that is 5 cm from the center of a circle with radius 13 cm?
Two circles with radii 5 and 3 are internally tangent. What is the distance between their centers?
What is the area of a parallelogram with base 12 and height 7?
A cube has volume 64. What is its surface area?
A cylinder has volume 200π and height 8. What is the radius?
A right prism has a triangular base with legs 5 and 12 and height (length) 10. What is the volume?
A cone has the same volume as a cylinder with radius 6 and height 4. If the cone has the same radius, what is the cone's height?
A rectangular tank is 10m × 8m × 5m. It is 60% full. How many more cubic meters are needed to fill it?
What is the slope of a vertical line?
A point is at (3, 4). What is its distance from the origin?
What is the equation of the line through (2, 6) parallel to y = −2x + 1?
The midpoint of segment AB is (4, 3). If A=(1, 1), what are the coordinates of B?
What is the area of a triangle with vertices (1,1),(5,1),(3,7)?

Is 2 a factor of every even number?

options.C: Only if the number is prime
options.D: Only if the number is composite

questions.explanation: By definition, every even number is divisible by 2.

A number is 5 more than 3 times another. Their product is 0. What are the possible values of the numbers?
questions.explanation: Let smaller=x. Larger=3x+5. x(3x+5)=0 → x=0 (larger=5) or x=−5/3 (larger=0).

questions.question: A faucet leaks at 3 gallons per hour. A bucket holds 45 gallons. How long until the bucket is full?
